testcase.name: tests.test_client
testcase.error: tests/test_client.py:16: in <module> class TestClient(unittest.TestCase): tests/test_client.py:101: in TestClient @patch("urllib3.PoolManager().request", return_value=empty_response(500)) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tests/test_client.py:12: in empty_response r.data = b"" ^^^^^^ E AttributeError: property 'data' of 'HTTPResponse' object has no setter
